title: Lightman's Currency Villager Tycoon Addon
description: Ai vibecoded to hell but it works and its small. This mod makes it so Villagers will randomly spawn around placed vending machines and purchase from them.
body:
👴 Lightmans Villager Tycoon
Transform your static vending machines into a bustling economic hub! Lightmans Villager Tycoon bridges the gap between the player-driven economy of Lightman's Currency and the world around you, allowing villagers to actually browse and purchase from your shops.

🚀 Overview
Why wait for other players to visit your shop when you can attract a local crowd? This mod introduces a dynamic Star Level system that rewards your entrepreneurial success. As your shop reaches new milestones, you'll attract wealthier, more frequent customers who are ready to spend their hard-earned coins.

✨ Key Features
🏪 Dynamic Foot Traffic
Villagers will now randomly spawn and gravitate toward placed Vending Blocks. No more lonely kiosks in the middle of nowhere—if you build it, they will come.

⭐ The Star Level System (0-5 Stars)
Your business reputation matters. Track your progress through a 5-tier growth system:

Tier 0: Occasional curious locals with low budgets.

Tier 5: Elite "Tycoon" class villagers appearing frequently with heavy pockets.

Progression: Reach custom milestones to unlock higher-tier customers.

⚙️ Full Configuration Control
Every aspect of the tycoon experience is at your fingertips. Tweak the config file to suit your playstyle:

Adjust Spawn Rates and radii around machines.

Define Milestone Requirements for star level-ups.

Control the Wealth Brackets of spawning villagers.

Use ./tycoon to spawn traders and manually set wallet sizes.

🛠 Requirements
Lightman's Currency (Required dependency)

Minecraft Version: [1.20.1]

Developer Note: This mod was "vibecoded" to add life to automated shops. It's designed to make your base feel like a living, breathing marketplace even in single-player or small private servers.
